sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: TOZ System (Force-like weapon collector)
special_mechanics.description: Player's ship fires out a TOZ System device similar to R-Type's Force. On contact with enemies, it inherits and learns their weapon. Player can steal from same enemy repeatedly until weapon strength is maxed out.

special_mechanics.name: Horizontal Scrolling Shooter Movement
special_mechanics.description: Ship movement mechanics typical of horizontally scrolling shooters on Genesis. No platforming elements.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Gaiares is a horizontally scrolling shoot-em-up (shmup), not a platformer. Traditional player character physics (gravity, jump mechanics) do not apply. Movement is ship-based with no documented physics parameters in available sources. The game focuses on weapon-acquisition gameplay via the TOZ System mechanic rather than movement mechanics.
